title: sambucus javanica subsp. chinensis
intro: Sambucus javanica subsp. chinensis, also known as Chinese elder, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. It is a shrub native to China and Japan, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. Sambucus javanica subsp. chinensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
